golden_glove.note: Reigning Golden Glove holder; pre-tournament favourite
First-choice behind one of the most organised defences
Leads at some books; standout for clean sheets + saves
Vastly experienced; dozens of clean sheets for Brazil
Shootout specialist behind a deep-running side
7 saves in a 0-0 draw with Spain

golden_ball.note: Hat-trick vs Algeria; joint-top all-time with 16 World Cup goals
Scored twice in the opener; moved past Pelé's 12 WC goals
FIFA Man of the Match in France's 3-1 win; electric form
Two goals + MOTM in Norway's 4-1 opening win
European Golden Shoe winner; scored twice vs Croatia
Goal + two assists in Sweden's 5-1 win over Tunisia
Two goals incl. a penalty in Germany's 7-1 rout
Two long-range strikes in Sweden's 5-1 opener
